text: polos shelicha yeshu'a hamashicha biretson elohim vetimotios achinu
el-haqedshim vehaachim haneemanim bamashicha asher hem beqolasa chesed lakhem veshalom meet haelohim avinu vaadoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha
modim anachenu lelohim avi adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha venitepalel ba'adekhem tamid
ki shama'enu emunatekhem bamashicha yeshu'a veahavatekhem et-kal-haqedshim
ba'avur hatiqeva hatsefuna lakhem bashamayim venode'a lakhem miqedem bidevar-emet shel-habesora
habaa aleykhem ulekhal-ha'olam vetifere vetirebe gam-betokhakhem lemin-hayom asher shema'etem vehikaretem beemet et-chesed elohim
kaasher gam-lemadetem min-epaferas hechaviv ha'oved 'imi asher-hu mesharet neeman ba'adekhem lamashicha
vehu gam-hodi'a otanu et-ahavatekhem barucha
ba'avur zot gam-anachenu lemin-hayom asher shema'anuha lo chadalenu lehitepalel ba'adekhem ulevaqesh shetimaleu da'at retson haelohim bekhal-chakhema utevuna ruchanit
lehitehalekh katov be'eyney haadon ukhekhal-chefetso vela'asot peri bekhal-ma'ase tov velirebot ulehosif lada'at elohim
lehitechazeq bekhal-kocha kigevurat kevodo lekhal-savelanut veorekh rucha 'im-simecha
velatet toda leavinu hamezake otanu becheleq nachalat haqedshim baor
asher hu chiletsanu mimemeshelet hachshekh vehe'eviranu lemalekhut ben-ahavato
asher yesh-lanu bo hapideyon bedamo selichat hachataim
vehu tselem haelohim hane'elam uvekhor kal-nivera
ki-vo nivera kol asher bashamayim vaasher baarets kol haniree vekhol asher-eynenu niree hen kiseot umemeshalot hen serarot verashuyot hakol nivera 'al-yado ulema'anehu
vehu lifeney hakol vehakol qayam bo
vehu rosh guf ha'eda asher hu reshit uvekhor me'im hametim lema'an yiheye harishon bakol
ki-khen haya haratson leshaken bo et-kal hamelo
uleratsot le'atsemo et-hakol 'al-yado ba'asoto shalom bedam-tseluvo 'al-yado hen asher baarets hen asher bashamayim
vegam-atem asher heyitem milefanim muzarim veoyevim binetot levavekhem acharey hama'asim hara'im
'ata ritsa etekhem beguf besaro 'al-yedey moto leha'amidekhem lefanayv qedshim uveli-mum vadofi
im-ta'amedu meyusadim unekhonim baemuna velo timotu mitochelet habesora asher shema'etem vaasher nisheme'a lekhal-hanivera tachat hashamayim vaasher ani folos hayiti lah limesharet
'ata hineni samecha be'inuyay asher ani sovel lema'anekhem vaamale mah-shechaser miyisurey hamashicha bivesari be'ad gufo hi ha'eda
asher hayiti lah limesharet kefi-fequdat elohim asher nitenah-li 'aleykhem lemalt et-devar haelohim
et-hasod asher haya ne'elam me'olamim umidor vador ve'ata nigela liqedoshayv
asher-ratsa haelohim lehodi'am ey-ze hu 'sher kevod hasod hahu bagoyim vehu hamashicha asher bakhem asher hu tiqevat hakavod
veoto mashemi'im anachenu behokhichenu khal-ish uvelamedenu khal-ish bekhal-chakhema lema'an ha'amid kal-ish shalem bamashicha yeshu'a
uvazot af-ani 'amel umitegoshesh kefi-fe'ulat kocho hapo'el bi bigevura
hineni modi'a etekhem godel haqerav sheli ba'adekhem uve'ad aneshey ludeqeya uve'ad kol asher lo-rau et-panay babasar
lema'an yenuchamu libotam veniqesheru yachad beahava ulekhal-'sher da'at nekhona lehavin ulehasekil sod haelohim avinu vesod hamashicha
asher genuzim bo kal-otserot hachakhema vehada'at
vezot omer ani lakhem lema'an asher-lo yate'e etekhem ish besifetey chalaqot
ki gam-im bivesari ani rachoq mikem hine veruchi ani etselekhem veesemach bireoti et-ma'amadekhem vetoqef emunatekhem bamashicha
lakhen kaasher qibaletem et-hamashicha et yeshu'a adoneynu ken gam-hitehalekhu vo
masherishim venivenim bo veqayamim baemuna kaasher lumadetem umarebim betoda bah
hizaharu pen-yolikh etekhem ish sholal befilosofeya uvemaduchey shave lefi qabalat beney haadam vetiquney ha'olam velo 'al-pi hamashicha
ki vo begufo shokhen kal-melo haelahut uvo atem nimelaim
asher hu rosh kal-serara veshaletan
uvo gam-nimaletem mila shel veyadayim behafeshatat guf habasar hachote hi milat hamashicha
ki niqebaretem ito batevila af-qametem ito batechiya 'al-yedey haemuna bigevurat elohim asher he'iro min-hametim
gam-etekhem hametim bapesha'im uve'arelat besarekhem hecheya ito biselocha lakhem et-kal-pishe'eykhem
vayimechaq et-hashetar hame'id banu bechuqotayv vayisaehu mitokhenu vayiteqa'ehu batseluv
vayafeshet et-hasarim vehashalitim vayitenem leraava bam rabim vayolikhem bo shevi
'al-ken lo-yadin ish etekhem 'al-devar maakhal umasheqe o-'al mo'adim verashey chodashim veshabatot
asher hem tsel hadevarim ha'atidim lavo vegufam hu vamashicha
al-titenu leish lehaavid sekharekhem 'al-yedey shifelut rucha va'avodat maleakhim vehu mehalekh bidevarim asher lo rau 'eynayv umale rucha gaava 'al-lo-davar misekhel besaro
veeynenu ochez barosh asher mimenu kal-haguf hamechubar vehamaochaz betsirayv udevaqayv yigedal gidul elohim
lakhen im-matem 'im-hamashicha letiquney ha'olam lama tisheta'ebedu lechuqim keilu 'odekhem chayim ba'olam
al-tochez al-tite'am al-tiga'
vehem 'omedim likhelot betashemisham lefi mitseot anashim velimudeyhem
hanireim ke'eyn chakhema ba'avoda veduya milev uveshifelut rucha uve'inuy haguf sheeyn bo mo'il raq-lehasebi'a habasar
lakhen im-qametem 'im-hamashicha baqeshu et asher lema'ela asher hamashicha yshev sham limin haelohim
et asher lema'ela yehege levavekhem lo et-asher baarets
ki-matem vechayeykhem tsefunim 'im-hamashicha belohim
be'et higalot hamashicha asher hu chayeykhem gam-atem tigalu 'imo bekhavod
'al-ken temotatu evareykhem baarets et-hazenut vehatumea vehazima vehataaot hara'ot unetot acharey habetsa' asher hi 'avodat elilim
ki bigelal ele yavo charon elohim 'al-beney hameri
asher gam-atem halakhetem bahem milefanim beshivetekhem betokham
akhe-'ata hasiru kal-ele me'aleykhem rogez vakha'as veresha' vegiduf vediverey nevala mipikhem
veal-teshaqeru ish ba'amito acharey asher peshatetem et-haadam hayashan ufe'ulotayv
ulevashetem et-haadam hechadash hamitechadesh bada'at ketselem boreo
asher eyn-bo yevani vihudi velo mila ve'arela velo lo'ez usequti velo 'eved uven-chorin ki hamashicha hu hakol uvakol
lakhen atem bechirey haelohim haqedshim vehachavivim liveshu hamon rachamim unedivut unemikhut rucha va'anava veerekh apayim
vetiseu ish et-re'ehu vetimechalu biheyot lakhem riv ish 'im-achiv kaasher hamashicha machal lakhem ken timechalu gam-atem
ve'al-kal-ele liveshu haahava hi agudat hashelemut
veyishelat bilevavekhem shelom hamashicha asher-niqeretem lo beguf echad vezivechu toda
devar hamashicha yishekon beqirebekhem beshefa' rav bekhal-chakhema utelamedu ute'oraru et-nafeshekhem bitehilot vetishebachot veshirot ruchaniot veshiru layho bine'ima bilevavekhem
vekhol asher-ta'asu beyn bemilin uveyn befo'al 'asu beshem haadon yeshu'a vehodu lelohim avinu 'al-yado
aten hanashim hikana'ena leva'aleykhen karauy baadoneynu
atem haanashim ehevu et-nesheykhem veal-titemaremeru aleyhen
habanim shime'u el-yoledeykhem bekhal-davar ki-hu leratson laadoneynu
haavot al-taregizu et-beneykhem pen-yiteyaashu
ha'avadim shime'u el-adoneykhem min-habasar lekhal-davar lo va'avoda shehi lemaree 'eynayim kimevaqeshim limetso chen be'eyney beney-adam ki im-betam-levav keyireey haelohim
kal-asher ta'asu 'asu bekhal-nafeshekhem kemi she'ose layho velo liveney-adam
vida'etem ki tiqechu meet yeho gemul hayerusha ki et-adoneynu hamashicha 'ovedim atem
vekhal-'ose 'avel hu yisa ha'avel asher 'asa veeyn-sham mas fanim
atem haadonim tenu le'avedeykhem hayashar vehashave ude'u ki gam-atem yesh-lakhem adon bashamayim
hatemidu batefila veshiqedu-vah betoda
vehitepalalu gam-ba'adenu lema'an yifetach-lanu haelohim et-sha'ar hadibur lechaot et-sod hamashicha asher ba'avuro asur anokhi
lema'an asher-agale oto kamishepat 'alay lechaot
hitenahagu vechakhema 'im-otam shebachuts vehoqiru et-hasha'a
divereykhem yiheyu ne'imim bekhal-'et umemulachim bamelach lema'an tede'u lehashiv davar lekhal-adam
'al-odotay yesaper lakhem hakol tukhiqos haach hechaviv vehamesharet haneeman ve'eved 'amiti baadon
asher lazot shelachetihu aleykhem lema'an yeda' et-divereykhem vinachem et-levavekhem
'im-onisimos haach haneeman vehechaviv asher-hu mikem hema yodi'u etekhem et-kal-devareynu po
arisetarekhos he'atsur 'imi yachad shoel lishelomekhem umareqos ben-achot bar-naba asher tsuveytem 'alayv im-yavo aleykhem teqabeluhu
veyeshu'a haniqera yusetos asher hem min-hamulim hema levadam min-ha'ozerim lemalekhut haelohim hayu-li lenechama
epaferas asher-hu mikem shoel lishelomekhem 'eved hamashicha hamitegoshesh ba'adekhem bitefiltayv bekhal-'et lema'an ta'amedu shelemim umeleim da'at lekhal-chefets elohim
ki me'id ani 'alayv ki qinea gedola hu meqane lakhem uleaneshey ludeqeya uleaneshey hirapolis
luqas harofe hechaviv vedimas shoalim lishelomekhem
shaalu lishelom haachim asher beludeqeya velishelom numefas vehaqehila asher beveyto
veacharey asher niqerea haigeret hazot etselekhem reu shetiqare gam-biqehal ludeqiyim veet-asher leludeqeya tiqerauha gam-atem
veimeru el-arekhipos shit libekha la'avoda asher qibaletah baadon lema'an temaleena
shoel lishelomekhem bikhetav yadi ani folos zikheru et-moseray hachesed 'imakhem amen ﻿
